title: Tangy Gooey Greek Beef Kebabs
description: A kid-friendly, halal-friendly Greek dish featuring tender beef, tangy ketchup-based sauce, and a gooey melted cheese topping, perfect for a fun family dinner. This recipe is easy to make and requires minimal ingredients.

ingredients.name: beef strips
ingredients.notes: sirloin or ribeye, cut into 1-inch pieces

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together ketchup, Greek yogurt, olive oil, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the beef strips to the bowl and mix until they are well coated with the sauce.
Knead the beef mixture with your hands for about 5 minutes until it is well combined and the beef is tender.
Thread the beef mixture onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the beef is cooked through.
While the beef is cooking, prepare the cheese topping by mixing the shredded mozzarella cheese with chopped parsley.
After the beef has cooked for 15-20 minutes, remove it from the oven and top each skewer with a spoonful of the cheese mixture.
Return the skewers to the oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and gooey.
Remove the skewers from the oven and serve hot.
